heading: Trusted by busy founders
subtitle: Here's what clients say after putting their operations on autopilot.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.quote: Our lead response time went from hours to minutes. The Facebook-to-HubSpot automation alone paid for itself in the first month.

items.name: James Carter
items.quote: The AI support assistant handles the majority of our tickets now. My team finally gets to focus on the complex, high-value work.

items.name: Elena Rodriguez
items.quote: Monthly reporting used to eat two full days. Now it's completely hands-off and the AI summaries are genuinely insightful.

items.name: David Okafor
items.quote: Joel understood our stack instantly and built onboarding automations that make every new customer feel premium from day one.
